song.title: Rhythms of Grace
song.lyrics:
[V1] My life is a light for Your cause My will laid aside for Your call And reserved are the depths of my heart Only for You
[V2] I'm caught in the rhythms of grace They overcome all of my ways Realigning each step every day To live for Your glory
[C1] And there's none beside You, God And there's none beside You, God
[V3] You're there in the dark of the night While holding the sun and its light Through the triumph and trials of life There's no one beside You
[V4] Your voice called the stars by their name Cause You whispered them all to their place To testify of Your wonder and grace Both now and forever
[C2] And there's none beside You, God There's none beside You, God I live my life to shine Your light ‘Cause there is none beside You, God
[B] No eye has seen No ear has heard The depths of Your love, Lord No mind can fathom The love You deserve How great You are!
song.author: Hillsong United
